category_sources: Official Google repository describes SentencePiece as a text tokenizer/detokenizer.
source_facts.description says SentencePiece is an unsupervised text tokenizer and detokenizer.
display_name_sources: Official Google repository uses the display name SentencePiece.
docs_sources: Official Google GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for SentencePiece.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/google/sentencepiece, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description supports tokenization, detokenization, and text-processing tags.
